/// @generated
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: Pgm
#include <array>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstdint>
#include <limits>
#include <string_view>


class fastdata final {


    static constexpr std::array<int32_t, 5> keys = {
        1, 2, 3, 4, 5
    };

    static constexpr std::array<int32_t, 3> seg_keys = {
        1, 6, std::numeric_limits<int32_t>::max()
    };

    static constexpr std::array<float, 3> seg_slopes = {
        13.8f, 0.0f, 0.0f
    };

    static constexpr std::array<int32_t, 3> seg_intercepts = {
        0, 5, 5
    };

    static constexpr int32_t evaluate_segment(const size_t seg, const int32_t key) noexcept {
        const double product = static_cast<double>(seg_slopes[seg]) * static_cast<double>(static_cast<uint32_t>(key) - static_cast<uint32_t>(seg_keys[seg]));
        if (product <= 0.0)
            return 0;

        // Clamp before narrowing; out-of-range floating-to-integer casts are undefined in C++.
        const int32_t max_pos = std::numeric_limits<int32_t>::max() - seg_intercepts[seg];
        if (product >= static_cast<double>(max_pos))
            return std::numeric_limits<int32_t>::max();
        return static_cast<int32_t>(product) + seg_intercepts[seg];
    }

    static constexpr int32_t get_segment_pos(const int32_t key) noexcept {
        size_t seg = 0;
        size_t seg_hi = 1;
        while (seg < seg_hi) {
            const size_t mid = seg + ((seg_hi - seg) >> 1);
            if (seg_keys[mid + 1] <= key)
                seg = mid + 1;
            else
                seg_hi = mid;
        }

        int32_t pos = evaluate_segment(seg, key);
        const int32_t next_intercept = seg_intercepts[seg + 1];
        if (pos > next_intercept) pos = next_intercept;
        return pos;
    }

public:
    [[nodiscard]]
    static constexpr bool contains(const int32_t key) noexcept {

        const int32_t pos = get_segment_pos(key);

        size_t lo = pos >= 64 ? static_cast<size_t>(pos - 64) : 0;
        size_t hi = static_cast<size_t>(pos) + 66;
        if (hi > 5) hi = 5;

        while (lo < hi) {
            const size_t mid = lo + ((hi - lo) >> 1);
            const int32_t mid_key = keys[mid];
            if (mid_key == key)
                return true;
            if (mid_key < key)
                lo = mid + 1;
            else
                hi = mid;
        }

        return false;
    }

    static constexpr size_t item_count = 5;
    static constexpr int32_t min_key = 1;
    static constexpr int32_t max_key = 5;
};
